log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 13] HIT! 13 damage. Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 46/59
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 13] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 13] HIT! 22 damage. Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 24/59
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 24/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 17] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 17] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 24/59 | AC: 13 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 17 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 13] HIT! 12 damage. Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 12/59
→ Concentration save: [d20:10+3=13 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 13] HIT! 19 damage. Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: -7/59
→ Concentration save: [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!

--- Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 13/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (13/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).

══ ROUND 2 ══
